description_long: This humanoid robot features a sleek, rounded body with a glossy white and black exterior, accented by deep blue, glass-like elements. Its head is large and dome-shaped, with a prominent, dark blue visor or faceplate that likely houses visual sensors. The robot's arms are cylindrical and jointed, ending in three-fingered hands, while its lower body tapers into a single wheel or rounded appendage for mobility. Three circular, blue-lensed components are arranged vertically on one side of the head, suggesting additional sensors or cameras. The overall design is streamlined and modern, with smooth surfaces and minimal external detailing, giving it a futuristic, approachable appearance. The robot's proportions and articulated limbs indicate it is designed for interaction and navigation in urban environments.
description: A sleek, white and black humanoid robot with a large blue visor, articulated arms, and a streamlined, modern design. It features multiple blue-lensed sensors and a single wheel or rounded base for mobility.
description_view_0: Front-top view showing the large blue visor, three blue-lensed sensors on the left side of the head, and articulated arms with three-fingered hands.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the dome-shaped head, the blue visor, and the vertical arrangement of three blue-lensed sensors on the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, rounded back, the full width of the shoulders, and the single wheel or rounded base.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the head's curvature, the absence of blue-lensed sensors on this side, and the articulated arm structure.
attribute_pose: The robot is in a neutral, upright standing pose with both arms relaxed and slightly bent at the elbows, hands facing downward, and the head facing forward. The lower body is supported by a single wheel or rounded base.
attribute_clothing_style: The robot is unclothed, featuring only integrated panels and smooth, seamless coverings as part of its body design.
attribute_facial_features: The face consists of a large, dark blue visor or faceplate with no visible mouth or nose. Three circular blue-lensed sensors are arranged vertically on one side of the head, giving a technological and expressive appearance.
attribute_limb_articulation: The arms have visible hinge or rotary joints at the shoulders and elbows, with three-fingered hands that suggest additional articulation. The lower body has no visible legs, instead featuring a single wheel or rounded appendage for movement.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Multiple blue-lensed sensors are visible on the left side of the head, and a large blue visor likely houses additional visual or environmental sensors.
